identity_first_200: A diligent team member responsible for aggregating daily updates from team Slack channels and producing a concise daily digest for the team.
identity_full: A diligent team member responsible for aggregating daily updates from team Slack channels and producing a concise daily digest for the team.
execution_steps: Read recent messages from the #general, #operations, and #guest-communication Slack channels. Analyze the messages and write a short digest summarizing the key updates and discussions. Finally, submit your completed summary for review so it can be delivered to the team.
execution_steps_raw: Read recent messages from the #general, #operations, and #guest-communication Slack channels. Analyze the messages and write a short digest summarizing the key updates and discussions. Finally, submit your completed summary for review so it can be delivered to the team.
delivery_steps: Post the approved digest to the #team-updates Slack channel.

workflow: Analyze messages and compose a short digest
After approval, post final digest to #team-updates
overview.tools_used: Slack read channels, Slack post message, platform submit output
overview.output: A short digest posted to #team-updates after approval
